vllm_ascend/device_allocator/camem.py::class CaMemAllocator  # CuMemAllocator 的昇腾移植单例：基于 CANN 虚拟内存(vllm_ascend_C.python_create_and_map / unmap_and_release)实现可插拔 allocator，撑 sleep mode；与 vLLM vllm/device_allocator/cumem.py::CuMemAllocator 近乎逐行同构，仅换符号(cudart→acl.rt, libcudart→vllm_ascend_C)

vllm_ascend/device_allocator/camem.py::CaMemAllocator.sleep(self, offload_tags: tuple[str, ...] | str | None = None) -> None  # 推理空窗期释放物理页：遍历 pointer_to_data，offload_tags 命中者 D2H 备份到 cpu_backup_tensor，再 unmap_and_release 解绑物理页(虚拟地址 VA 不变)

vllm_ascend/device_allocator/camem.py::CaMemAllocator.wake_up(self, tags: list[str] | None = None) -> None  # sleep 的逆：create_and_map 重新映射物理页到原 VA，有 cpu_backup_tensor 者 H2D 拷回(VA 三态恒等：alloc/sleep/wake 同一虚拟地址)
